overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 game footage showing a first-person elevator ascent through a futuristic Night City district at night. The camera reveals dense neon-lit skyscrapers, massive digital billboards, and holographic advertisements while ascending smoothly through a glass elevator shaft, transitioning from street-level views to rooftop architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass elevator shaft with view of lower city streets

agents.ego_description: riding a glass elevator upward through a high-rise building, observing the neon-lit cityscape and street below through the transparent walls

entered.detail: transparent elevator cabin with dark metal framework visible in foreground
tall futuristic buildings with cyan and green neon accent lighting against night sky
illuminated urban street with moving vehicle lights and palm trees visible at ground level
white building columns with horizontal cyan neon light strips passing by the elevator

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a glass elevator ascending through a cyberpunk cityscape at night. Distant neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the horizon while the illuminated street with sparse traffic is visible far below. The elevator passes close to an adjacent building featuring white structural columns with cyan neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator passing between high-rise structures with emerging billboard views

events.description: view opens from narrow shaft to reveal large digital billboards and open plaza below
structural columns temporarily block the left side of the view as elevator passes

agents.ego_description: continuing the smooth elevator ascent, passing close to adjacent building structures and revealing new architectural elements

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'ALL EYES' text with a portrait against yellow background
round elevated platforms with greenery and lighting visible on the ground level below

segments.scene_description: As the elevator continues ascending, the view transitions to reveal a massive 'ALL EYES' digital billboard on the right and circular plaza structures visible below. The structural columns with cyan lighting move from near to mid-distance as the elevator passes them, temporarily occluding the view before opening up to show more of the dense urban advertising landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper elevator shaft with panoramic view of dense advertising district

events.description: view shifts to show massive multi-screen advertising building dominating the right side
pink holographic lighting becomes dominant as large holographic billboard comes into full view

agents.ego_description: ascending higher through the building core, revealing expansive views of the illuminated advertising district and holographic displays

entered.detail: building facade completely covered in multiple layered digital advertisement screens showing various content
large three-dimensional glowing pink holographic projection of a human face floating in space
billboard featuring a gorilla image with text 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The elevator reaches upper levels revealing a building completely covered in digital advertisements on the right. A massive pink holographic face billboard appears on the left, casting pink light into the shaft. The 'SKY HIGH' billboard becomes visible ahead while the structural columns fade into the distance and the plaza below becomes too distant to distinguish.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop level with mix of traditional and futuristic architecture

events.description: view reveals traditional Japanese pagoda-style structure with green neon accents on the left
colorful 'EAT THE RICH' neon sign becomes prominently visible on a structure below

agents.ego_description: approaching the top of the elevator shaft, revealing rooftop structures, elevated walkways, and upper city architecture with traditional elements

entered.detail: traditional tiered pagoda structure illuminated with green neon accent lighting on the roof edges
large colorful neon ground sign with text 'EAT THE RICH' in pink, yellow, and blue letters

segments.scene_description: In the final ascent, the elevator reveals a traditional Japanese pagoda structure with green neon lighting on the left and a prominent 'EAT THE RICH' neon sign below. The view opens to show elevated walkways and rooftop architecture against the night sky, with the pink holographic billboard now distant on the left as the elevator approaches its destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent in a glass elevator, transitioning from a street-level view of a neon-lit metropolis to the high-altitude architecture of a cyberpunk skyline. It begins by rising past white structural columns with cyan accents, leaving the illuminated streets and sparse traffic far below. As the elevator climbs, the view shifts to reveal a massive ALL EYES digital billboard and circular plaza structures before the perspective opens up to a dense landscape of urban advertising. The scene then expands as the elevator reaches the upper levels, where a giant pink holographic face casts a glow into the shaft and a SKY HIGH billboard appears ahead. Finally, the ascent reveals a green-lit Japanese pagoda and an EAT THE RICH neon sign, moving past elevated walkways and rooftop structures against the dark night sky.
